languages.text: "Вивисектор не виноват в смерти твоего сына. Ты можешь считать месть свершенной".
"The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."
languages.original_text: "Вивисектор не виноват в смерти твоего сына. Ты можешь считать месть свершенной".

traits.locale_text: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."
"The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."
"The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."

languages.text: 「解剖師はあなたの息子さんの死の責任がない。復讐は完了したと考えることができる」
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."

traits.locale_text: 「解剖師はあなたの息子さんの死の責任を負いません。復讐は完了したと考えることができます。」

languages.text: "Dirikesimci, oğlunun ölümünden sorumlu değildi. İntikamını alınmış sayabilirsin."
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."

traits.locale_text: "Dirikesimci, oğlunun ölümünden sorumlu değildi. İntikamını alınmış sayabilirsin."

languages.text: «El vivisector no es el responsable de la muerte de su hijo. Puede considerar su venganza cumplida».
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."

traits.locale_text: «El vivisector no es el responsable de la muerte de su hijo. Puede considerar su venganza cumplida».

languages.text: “你儿子的死与那位解剖者无关。你的复仇可以到此为止了。”
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."

traits.locale_text: “你儿子的死与那位解剖者无关。你的复仇可以到此为止了。”

languages.text: « Le vivisecteur n'est pas responsable de la mort de votre fils. Vous avez déjà assouvi votre vengeance. »
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."

traits.locale_text: « Le vivisecteur n'est pas responsable de la mort de votre fils. Vous avez déjà assouvi votre vengeance. »

languages.text: "Der Vivisektor war nicht verantwortlich für den Tod Eures Sohnes. Ihr könnt Eure Rache als abgeschlossen betrachten."
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."

traits.locale_text: "Der Vivisektor war nicht verantwortlich für den Tod Eures Sohnes. Ihr könnt Eure Rache als abgeschlossen betrachten."
